zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Donne於1450年出生在英國英格蘭爾武特金頓時，她的父親John Done III30歲，母親Cecily Troutbeck23歲。她於1477年與Tochett De Beeston在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1541年2月在英國英格蘭爾貝斯頓享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Donne于1450年出生在英国英格兰爾武特金頓时，她的父亲John Done III30岁，母亲Cecily Troutbeck23岁。她于1477年与Tochett De Beeston在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1541年2月在英国英格兰爾貝斯頓享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Donne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

variants.name: Done
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alfredo, Angel, Berto, Cristobal, Dinora, Eloisa, Francisco, Generoso, Gustavo, Juan.
English: variant of Donne, itself a variant of Dunn .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Donne was born in 1450, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Done III, was 30 and her mother, Cecily Troutbeck, was 23. She married Tochett De Beeston in 1477, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 4 daughters. She died in February 1541, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Donne est née en 1450, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Done III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cecily Troutbeck, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Tochett De Beeston en 1477, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1541, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Donne 1450 in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Done III 30 und ihre Mutter Cecily Troutbeck 23. Sie hat 1477 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Tochett De Beeston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im Februar 1541 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Donne è nata il nel 1450 nel Utkinton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Done III, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Cecily Troutbeck, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Tochett De Beeston nel 1477, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1541, nel Beeston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Donneが1450年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントンで生まれた時，父John Done IIIは30歳，母Cecily Troutbeckは23歳であった。1477年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでTochett De Beestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1541年2月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Donne(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 우트킨턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Done III(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Troutbeck(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Tochett De Beeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1541년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브이스턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Donne nasceu em 1450, em Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Done III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Troutbeck, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Tochett De Beeston em 1477, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1541, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Donne родилась в 1450 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Done III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Troutbeck, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tochett De Beeston в 1477 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла февраль 1541 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Donne nació en 1450, en Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Done III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Cecily Troutbeck, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Tochett De Beeston en 1477, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1541, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años.
